pr.title: Fix Devin Review bugs: rsync, persist-credentials, TBD placeholders
pr.body: # PLATE Pull Request ## Summary Fixes bugs identified by Devin Review on PR #2, plus related review feedback from CodeRabbit. All changes are to documentation, process metadata, and workflow configuration — no product behavior changes. ### Fixes applied 1. **`rsync --delete` destroys `tmp_wiki/.git/`** (Devin Review 🔴 BUG): Added `--exclude='.git'` to the rsync command in `sync-wiki-on-merge.yml` so the cloned wiki repository metadata is preserved. 2. **`rsync --delete` also deletes `Last-Feature-Merge.md`** (Devin Review 🚩 ANALYSIS): Moved the `Last-Feature-Merge.md` copy to *after* the rsync so it is not wiped by `--delete`. 3. **`persist-credentials: false` missing on checkout** (CodeRabbit): Added `persist-credentials: false` to the `actions/checkout@v4` step so credentials are not left in the git config after the job completes. 4. **`wiki-sync` extension missing `human_approval_required`** (CodeRabbit): Added `human_approval_required: true` to match the other extensions. 5. **TBD placeholders in `CHANGELOG.md` and `CURRENT.md`** (CodeRabbit): Replaced with actual PR #2 references and verification date. ## Required PR Type Label - [ ] `Bug` - [ ] `Feature` - [x] `Documentation` ## Linked Work | Link Type | URL or Reference | |---|---| | Issue | — | | Epic | — | | ADR / Discussion | PR #2 review comments | ## Tests and Evidence | Evidence Type | Command, Artifact, or Explanation | Result | |---|---|---| | YAML validation | `python3 -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open(...))\"` for all changed YAML files | Pass | | Manual verification | Reviewed rsync behavior with `--exclude='.git'` flag and post-rsync copy ordering | Correct | ## Documentation and Traceability | Artifact | Required for This PR? | Updated or Explanation | |---|---|---| | `SPEC.md` | No | No product changes | | `CURRENT.md` | Yes (TBD placeholders fixed) | Updated verification metadata and feature entry | | Wiki or docs source | No | N/A | | Release notes / `CHANGELOG.md` | Yes (TBD placeholders fixed) | Updated PR reference | | Public claims / marketing | No | N/A | | `.agentic/*` process metadata | Yes | `extensions.yml` updated with `human_approval_required` for wiki-sync | ## Risk and Rollback | Question | Answer | |---|---| | Risk label applied, if any | None | | User, data, security, or public-claim risk | None — fixes existing bugs in workflow that was already disabled by default | | Rollback plan | Revert this commit | | Follow-up issue needed | No | ## Agent Self-Review - [x] I followed `AGENTS.md` and did not change product intent without human approval. - [x] I used GitHub Projects fields, not labels, for mutable planning state. - [x] I did not weaken tests, remove required gates, or bypass review. - [x] I updated `CURRENT.md` for a Feature PR or explained why this PR is not a Feature. - [x] I left enough evidence for a human reviewer to verify the change without relying on chat history. Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/2b2142fd63f845e88ff1e8a34364a1b5 Requested by: @akasper ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
